endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Addons/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Addons RP operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Addons/supportProviders/canonical/listSupportPlanInfo
endpoints.description: Returns the canonical support plan information for all types for the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Addons/supportProviders/{providerName}/supportPlanTypes/{planTypeName}
endpoints.description: Returns whether or not the canonical support plan of type {type} is enabled for the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PLANTYPENAME}} with a real plantypename. Replace {{PROVIDERNAME}} with a real providername.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Addons/supportProviders/{providerName}/supportPlanTypes/{planTypeName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates the Canonical support plan of type {type} for the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PLANTYPENAME}} with a real plantypename. Replace {{PROVIDERNAME}} with a real providername.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Addons/supportProviders/{providerName}/supportPlanTypes/{planTypeName}
endpoints.description: Cancels the Canonical support plan of type {type} for the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PLANTYPENAME}} with a real plantypename. Replace {{PROVIDERNAME}} with a real providername.
